acceptance_targets: [chapter_11_craft_001] Pass if the revised narration at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:105, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:167, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:205, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:347, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:519, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:525 preserves the same beats but renders them in complete spoken-thought or narrative clauses; fail if more than one of those passages still relies on stacked bare fragments for emphasis.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised narration at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:105, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:167, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:205, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:347, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:519, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:525 preserves the same beats but renders them in complete spoken-thought or narrative clauses; fail if more than one of those passages still relies on stacked bare fragments for emphasis.
findings.evidence: Narration repeatedly falls into constitution-breaking fragment stacks and bare-noun inventories at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:105, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:167, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:205, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:347, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:519, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:525.
findings.problem: The chapter keeps reaching for emphasis through clipped narration instead of through complete, pressurized sentences. Because this happens across multiple key beats, it stops reading as a one-off choice and starts reading like a default mechanism. That breaches the constitution's ban on elliptical clipping and weakens the chapter's otherwise strong physical consequence.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rebuild the emphatic beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:105, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:167, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:205, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:347, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:519, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:525 into grammatically complete clauses that still feel fast and ugly under pressure. Keep the same emotional turns, but make the rhythm come from syntax, sensory detail, and leverage rather than from article-stripped fragment chains.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the collision of sanctity, lust, labor, rot, and family resentment. In edge cases, choose the more concrete, uncomfortable, and character-specific rendering over symbolic safety; if an image or action feels too polite for the pressure, it is probably wrong.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, violence, shame, grief, or economic pressure drives a scene, vague language counts as a failed beat; replace euphemism with the exact bodily, social, or material consequence the character experiences.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm across dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for ritual speech, emphasis, or deliberate character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and narrative movement aggressively: follow ordeal with meal, revelation with labor, schism with care, and public spectacle with close-bodied aftermath so no adjacent chapters share the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, bodily, locally sacred, and unsanitized; lyrical only when pressure earns it, never as a decorative default.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person rotating among the five siblings; each scene stays inside one consciousness and lets the river press through perception rather than omniscient explanation.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular propulsion with denser lyric accumulation; peak scenes should tighten and clarify rather than dissolve into fragmentary haze.
